allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; runs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['workflow_runs']; [print\(r['name'], r['status'], r['conclusion'], r['head_commit']['message'][:60]\) for r in runs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; runs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['workflow_runs']; [print\(r['name'], r['status'], r['conclusion'], r['head_sha'][:8], r['head_commit']['message'][:50]\) for r in runs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; runs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['workflow_runs']; [print\(r['name'][:25], r['conclusion'], r['head_sha'][:8], r['head_commit']['message'][:45]\) for r in runs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['id']\) for r in d['workflow_runs'] if 'Deploy' in r['name']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(j['name'], j['conclusion'], [s['name']+':'+s['conclusion'] for s in j['steps']]\) for j in d['jobs']]")
